kw.name: Evaluate
kw.msg: ${options} = <selenium.webdriver.chrome.options.Options object at 0x000001FFEFEA6900>
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Create Webdriver
kw.msg: Creating an instance of the Chrome WebDriver.
kw.doc: Creates an instance of Selenium WebDriver.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Browser Implicit Wait
kw.doc: Sets the implicit wait value used by Selenium.

test.name: TC_01: Dang Nhap Quyen Quan Tri

kw.name: Go To
kw.msg: Opening url 'http://localhost:3000/login'
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'admin@gmail.com' into text field 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='Nhập email']'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Typing password into text field 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='Mật khẩu']'.
Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.msg: Clicking button 'xpath=//button[text()='Đăng nhập']'.
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: Chào mừng đến với trang quản trị
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

test.doc: Kiểm tra chức năng đăng nhập và chuyển hướng vào trang quản trị

test.name: TC_02: Quan Ly Nguoi Dung - CRUD User

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//a[contains(., '👥 Quản lý Tài khoản')]'.
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.msg: Clicking button 'xpath=//button[text()='+ Thêm Người dùng Mới']'.
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Robot Admin Tester' into text field 'name=user_name'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'admin_test@gmail.com' into text field 'name=email'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Typing password into text field 'name=password'.
Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'name=roleid' by value 2.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.msg: Clicking button 'xpath=//button[text()='Lưu']'.
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: Thêm người dùng mới thành công!
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: Kiểm tra thêm mới người dùng và tính đồng bộ dữ liệu

test.name: TC_03: Quan Ly San Pham - Luu Specs JSON

kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.msg: Typing text 'Monitor Samsung Curved Robot' into text field 'name=name'.

kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'name=category_id' by index 1.

kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: Thêm sản phẩm mới thành công!
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.msg: Text 'Thêm danh mục thành công!' did not appear in 15 seconds.

test.name: TC_06: Quy Trinh Xu Ly Don Hang

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//a[contains(., '$$ Quản lý doanh thu $$')]'.
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: Quản lý Doanh thu & Đơn hàng
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.msg: Element 'xpath=(//button[text()='Xử lý'])[1]' not visible after 10 seconds.
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
kw.status: Element 'xpath=(//button[text()='Xử lý'])[1]' not visible after 10 seconds.

test.doc: Kiểm tra sự hiển thị và hoạt động của nút duyệt đơn (Kịch bản xác định lỗi UI)
test.status: Element 'xpath=(//button[text()='Xử lý'])[1]' not visible after 10 seconds.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
